entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Tropical regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall, hosting many small-holding farmers

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The long-term heating of Earth's climate system observed since the pre-industrial period

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas whose atmospheric increase leads to global warming and affects plant physiology

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GASES
entities.description: Gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, contributing to the greenhouse effect

entities.name: GLOBAL TEMPERATURES
entities.description: The average temperature of the Earth's atmosphere

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: The distribution, frequency, and amount of precipitation over a region

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet the demands of the environment and plants

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CROP
entities.description: Crops adapted to grow in semi-arid environments

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural product harvested per unit area

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL CHANGES
entities.description: Alterations in the normal functions of the plant organism

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL CHANGES
entities.description: Alterations in the chemical processes occurring within the plant

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHANGES
entities.description: Alterations at the molecular level within the plant systems

entities.name: CROP WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of crop yield to the amount of water transpired and evaporated

entities.name: NET PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The total rate of carbon fixation minus the rate of respiration

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living biological organisms in a given area

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested grain to the total above-ground biomass

entities.name: C3 CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that use the C3 carbon fixation pathway

entities.name: C4 CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that use the C4 carbon fixation pathway

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The rate of passage of carbon dioxide entering or water vapor exiting through the stomata

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts

entities.name: LEAF TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature of the plant leaf surface

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE SCENARIOS
entities.description: Predicted future climate conditions based on various emission levels

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
